fields.acceptance_criteria: Deliver a production-ready, all-Rust harness where a single minimal UI can start ad-hoc conversations and supervise long-running autonomous loops with full event streaming, isolation, and validation evidence.
fields.title: [agent-harness] Unified minimal interface for on-demand chat + long-running agent loops (Rust core, TUI + WASM)
fields.validation_plan: Validate architecture and behavior with unit/integration/e2e coverage across core loop, server broadcast, and both UI clients; include browser verification and screenshots for frontend behavior.
